landing.workspace.setup.name: Setup
landing.workspace.setup.desc: Manage staff, locations, roles, pay rates, Wi-Fi/geo and the activity log for the entire company.
landing.workspace.manager.name: Store manager
landing.workspace.manager.desc: Schedule shifts, track attendance in real time, approve overtime, and assign staff roles.
landing.workspace.finance.name: Finance
landing.workspace.finance.desc: View weekly reports, reconcile projected vs. actual labor costs, and export CSV by period.

login.left.headline: Attendance, scheduling, and payroll — all in one place.
login.left.subtitle: Sign in with your company Lark account to access the store management, finance, or system setup workspace.
login.card.heading: Welcome back
login.card.subtitle: Use the Lark account your company has authorized to access the system.
login.card.error.title: Sign-in failed
login.card.error.body: Your Lark account has not been granted access. Contact the system administrator for assistance.
login.card.why.label: Why sign in only via Lark?
login.card.why.body: Passwords are managed centrally on Lark — not stored on Better Attendance servers. When a staff member leaves, the administrator only needs to revoke access on Lark and all permissions are automatically removed.
